description.name: AtomFleet Proxmox Admin
description.tagline: WHMCS admin dashboard and IPv4 pool manager for AtomFleet Proxmox servers.
description.long: AtomFleet Proxmox Admin gives WHMCS administrators a cluster overview, guest inventory, managed IPv4 pool controls, and fast Proxmox jump-off points without moving deep infrastructure control out of Proxmox.
features: IPv4 pool import and release controls
